1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""
3	MiniMax Agent HUD — Live terminal dashboard.
4	Run: PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python ~/.claude/hud.py
5	"""
6	
7	import time
8	import os
9	from datetime import datetime
10	from pathlib import Path
11	from rich.console import Console, Group
12	from rich.live import Live
13	from rich.table import Table
14	from rich.panel import Panel
15	from rich.text import Text
16	
17	TOKEN_LOG = Path.home() / ".claude" / "skills" / "_token_log.md"
18	LEARNINGS = Path.home() / ".claude" / "skills" / "_learnings.md"
19	STOCKPILE = Path.home() / ".claude" / "agents" / "_stockpile.md"
20	SESSION_START = datetime.now()
21	DAILY_BUDGET = 15000
22	
23	console = Console(legacy_windows=False)
24	
25	
26	def get_budget():
27	    today = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
28	    total = 0
29	    sessions = 0
30	    if TOKEN_LOG.exists():
31	        try:
32	            content = TOKEN_LOG.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
33	            for block in content.split("## Session:"):
34	                lines = block.strip().split("\n")
35	                if not lines or not lines[0].strip().startswith(today):
36	                    continue
37	                sessions += 1
38	                for line in lines:
39	                    if "Total tokens:" in line:
40	                        try:
41	                            total += int(line.split(":")[-1].strip().replace(",", ""))
42	                        except ValueError:
43	                            pass
44	        except Exception:
45	            pass
46	    remaining = max(0, DAILY_BUDGET - total)
47	    pct = (total / DAILY_BUDGET) * 100 if total > 0 else 0
48	    return total, remaining, pct, sessions
49	
50	
51	def get_learnings():
52	    if not LEARNINGS.exists():
53	        return 0
54	    try:
55	        content = LEARNINGS.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
56	        return content.count("### What worked") + content.count("### What failed")
57	    except:
58	        return 0
59	
60	
61	def get_agents():
62	    if not STOCKPILE.exists():
63	        return []
64	    agents = []
65	    in_active = False
66	    try:
67	        for line in STOCKPILE.read_text(encoding="utf-8").split("\n"):
68	            if "## Active Agents" in line:
69	                in_active = True
70	                continue
71	            if line.startswith("## ") and in_active:
72	                break
73	            if "|" in line and in_active and "Agent" not in line:
74	                parts = [p.strip() for p in line.split("|")[1:-1]]
75	                if len(parts) >= 6:
76	                    agents.append(
77	                        {
78	                            "name": parts[0],
79	                            "quality": parts[6] if len(parts) > 6 else "medium",
80	                            "last": parts[4],
81	                            "used": parts[5] if len(parts) > 5 else "?",
82	                        }
83	                    )
84	    except Exception:
85	        pass
86	    return agents
87	
88	
89	def budget_bar(pct):
90	    W = 20
91	    filled = min(int(W * pct / 100), W)
92	    c = "green" if pct < 50 else "yellow" if pct < 75 else "red"
93	    return Text(f"[{c}]" + "#" * filled + "-" * (W - filled) + f"[/{c}]  {pct:.0f}%")
94	
95	
96	def make_layout(
97	    budget_total, budget_remaining, budget_pct, session_count, learnings, agents
98	):
99	    """Build all the panels for one frame."""
100	    elapsed = datetime.now() - SESSION_START
101	    budget_color = (
102	        "green" if budget_pct < 50 else "yellow" if budget_pct < 75 else "red"
103	    )
104	
105	    # Budget table
106	    t = Table(box=None, show_header=False, padding=(0, 1))
107	    t.add_column(style="bold")
108	    t.add_column()
109	    t.add_row("SPENT", f"[bold cyan]{budget_total:,}[/] / 15,000")
110	    t.add_row("LEFT", f"[bold yellow]{budget_remaining:,}[/] tokens")
111	    t.add_row("BAR", str(budget_bar(budget_pct)))
112	    warn = (
113	        "[red bold]OVER[/]"
114	        if budget_pct >= 90
115	        else "[yellow]HEAVY[/]" if budget_pct >= 75 else "[green]normal[/]"
116	    )
117	    t.add_row("STATUS", warn)
118	
119	    # Agents table
120	    at = Table(box=None, show_header=True, header_style="bold dim", padding=(0, 1))
121	    at.add_column("AGENT", style="bold cyan", width=22)
122	    at.add_column("Q", justify="center")
123	    at.add_column("USED", justify="right")
124	    at.add_column("LAST", width=10)
125	    for a in agents:
126	        q = a["quality"]
127	        qc = "green" if q == "high" else "yellow" if q == "medium" else "red"
128	        at.add_row(
129	            a["name"][:22],
130	            f"[{qc}]{q[0].upper()}[/{qc}]",
131	            str(a["used"]),
132	            a["last"][:10],
133	        )
134	    if not agents:
135	        at.add_row("[dim]waiting...[/]", "", "", "")
136	
137	    # Stats
138	    st = Table(box=None, show_header=False, padding=(0, 1))
139	    st.add_column(style="bold")
140	    st.add_column(style="bold cyan")
141	    st.add_row("LEARNINGS", str(learnings))
142	    st.add_row("SESSIONS", str(session_count))
143	    st.add_row("ELAPSED", str(elapsed).split(".")[0])
144	
145	    return t, at, st, budget_color
146	
147	
148	def generate():
149	    """Generator for Live — yields a single renderable per frame."""
150	    while True:
151	        budget_total, budget_remaining, budget_pct, session_count = get_budget()
152	        learnings = get_learnings()
153	        agents = get_agents()
154	        t, at, st, bc = make_layout(
155	            budget_total, budget_remaining, budget_pct, session_count, learnings, agents
156	        )
157	
158	        left_col = Table(box=None, padding=0)
159	        left_col.add_column()
160	        left_col.add_row(
161	            Panel(
162	                t,
163	                title=f"[{bc}]  TOKEN BUDGET  [/{bc}]",
164	                border_style=bc,
165	                padding=(0, 1),
166	            )
167	        )
168	        left_col.add_row(
169	            Panel(st, title="  STATS  ", border_style="cyan", padding=(0, 1))
170	        )
171	
172	        right_col = Table(box=None, padding=0)
173	        right_col.add_column()
174	        right_col.add_row(
175	            Panel(at, title="  AGENTS  ", border_style="cyan", padding=(0, 1))
176	        )
177	
178	        row = Table(box=None, padding=0)
179	        row.add_column(ratio=1)
180	        row.add_column(ratio=1)
181	        row.add_row(left_col, right_col)
182	
183	        header = Panel(
184	            f"[bold deep_pink3]MINIMAX HUD[/]  [dim]{datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')}",
185	            style="bold white on black",
186	        )
187	
188	        yield Group(header, row, "")
189	
190	        time.sleep(5)
191	
192	
193	def main():
194	    console.print("[bold deep_pink3]Starting HUD...[/]")
195	    time.sleep(1)
196	    try:
197	        with Live(console=console, refresh_per_second=0.2) as live:
198	            for renderable in generate():
199	                live.update(renderable)
200	    except KeyboardInterrupt:
201	        pass
202	    finally:
203	        console.clear()
204	        console.print("[bold green]HUD closed.\n")
205	
206	
207	if __name__ == "__main__":
208	    main()
209

- Uses `rich.console.Console(legacy_windows=False)` — designed for modern terminals
- Generator-based (`generate()`) for efficient Live refresh at 0.2 fps
